summary: Verified spinner->modal sequence on all 4 inscription pages (inscricao-edital-01/02/03/04.html). All pages show #insc-loading with .im-spinner (no text) immediately after clicking BTN_Avancar, and #insc-modal 'Inscrição realizada!' only appears after ~1s. Modal OK button navigates correctly to /minhas-inscricoes.html.
critical_code_review_comments: Spinner/modal script and CSS is duplicated across the 4 inscricao-edital-0X.html files. Consider extracting <style id='insc-modal-css'> and <script id='insc-modal-js'> into shared external files (e.g. /public/assets/insc-modal.css and /public/assets/insc-modal.js) parameterized by data-attribute for CONC, to keep DRY.
Cloudflare beacon and challenge scripts are blocked by CSP (script-src 'unsafe-inline' data:). Not caused by this fix, but worth noting.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test verified: on all 4 pages, after clicking BTN_Avancar with valid CMB_Cargo option and CHK_AceitoRequerimento checked, #insc-loading with .im-spinner (empty text) is present at t~150ms and #insc-modal is absent; at t~1350ms #insc-loading is gone and #insc-modal with title 'Inscrição realizada!' and [data-testid='modal-ok'] is visible. OK button navigates to /minhas-inscricoes.html with correct query params. Sample valid CMB_Cargo values: 01->16321, 02->16317, 03->16316, 04->16311.
